spec_match.rationale: Removal feature — page covers one slice (probe / migration / note) but the spec's full removal+replacement story is split across multiple concepts; this page can't carry it alone.

interactive.rationale: 1 buttons / 2 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on etld, origin, primary, related).

edge_cases.rationale: Some fallback / error handling is present but corner cases like removed-element behaviour, denied permission flow, or no-support browsers aren't all covered.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5194473869017088 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from the shared CSS variables and the layout follows the stage + controls editorial pattern.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: SSO and account linking migration patterns
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-related-website-sets-rws feature's headline framing — Related Website Sets removal — cross-site cookie access for related domains goes away — calls out "SSO and account linking migration patterns". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: Storage Access API as the replacement
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-related-website-sets-rws feature's headline framing — Related Website Sets removal — cross-site cookie access for related domains goes away — calls out "Storage Access API as the replacement". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

summary: rws-note under deprecate-and-remove-related-website-sets-rws: 4 pass / 2 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design system clean, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
